title: Little Structures
description:
Adds atmosphere with 30+ subtle, vanilla-friendly ruins and structures blending into the environment. 

Maybe some of them are remnants of ancient builders?
body:
**VERSION 2.0 OUT NOW!🎉**

## 🏛️Description
**Little Structures** adds _small_, _biome-specific_ buildings and ruins to your world. Designed to be **vanilla-friendly**, these structures feature unique loot and blend naturally into the environment.

For structure-exploration you can use 
```
/locate structure littlestructure:<structure-name>
```

## 🌄Overview
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b19fcde3a82e5d09269109810d7b4fa999b9abf9.jpeg)
![Several impressions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/966dd86f2ff356d5290984c2431572c08b4ef488.gif)
---
## 📈Features

| Structure                            | Biome                                           | Version added | Variations | Chests |
| ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ---------- | ------ |
| Jungle Statues (Knight, Gold)        | Jungle, Sparse Jungle                           | v1.1          | yes        | ✅      |
| Forest Statues (Wizard, Iron)        | Forest, Flower Forest                           | v1.1          | yes        | ✅      |
| Plains Statues (Ceremonial, Crystal) | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Snowy Plains          | v1.1          | yes        | ❌      |
| Monolith                             | Savanna, Old Growth                             | v1.1          | no         | ✅      |
| 7 Ruins                              | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Savanna, Snowy Plains | v1.1          | yes        | ❌/✅    |
| Several New Statues                  | wie andere Statuen                              | v2.0          | yes        | ❌/✅    |
| Biome-Specific Ruins                 | Nether Wastes, Desert, Mesa                     | v2.0          | yes        | ❌      |
| Normal Ruins and small additions     | Plains, Forest                                  | v2.0          | yes        | ❌      |
| Campfire                             | Forest                                          | v2.0          | yes        | ❌      |
| Chorus-Farm                          | End Mainland                                    | v2.0          | no         | ✅      |
| Mysterious End-Checkpoint            | Small End Islands                               | v2.0          | no         | ✅      |
| Campsite                             | Forest                                          | v2.0          | no         | ❌      |
| Oasis                                | Desert                                          | v2.0          | no         | ❌      |
| Red/Brown Mushroom Hut               | Mushroom Fields, Dark Oak Forest                | v2.0          | yes        | ✅      |


Planned Features:
- More custom Loot-tables
- Config

Upcoming Builds:
- Way more subtle ruins & variations
- Illager Watchtower
- Illager Mine
- Hobbit-"Cave"
- Nether Fossile-sites
- Forest Dweller House

---
This is a modern version (with ongoing updates) of our old (1.12) Mod on CurseForge
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee6b494f1981402c56337c9ee6414b19251d22fe_0.webp)

> Made by MatBayern and SumiiRing
> - also available on [GitHub](https://github.com/MatBayern/littleStructuresDatapack)
---
